ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the tweet */,
  "in_reply_to_screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user being replied to */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Whether the tweet is a retweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet has received */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet has received */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter for iPhone) */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the tweet */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* ID of the place where the tweet was posted */,
  "quoted_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quoted tweet */,
  "possibly_sensitive" INTEGER /* Whether the tweet is possibly sensitive */,
  "withheld_copyright" INTEGER /* Whether the tweet is withheld for copyright */,
  "withheld_in_countries" TEXT /* Countries where the tweet is withheld */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_in_reply_to_screen_name FOREIGN KEY ("in_reply_to_screen_name") REFERENCES users ("screen_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends (following) the user has */,
  "listed_count" INTEGER /* Number of public lists the user is a member of */,
  "favourites_count" INTEGER /* Number of tweets the user has liked */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "dashboard_settings" TEXT /* Customizable dashboard settings for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hashtag was first used */,
  "trend_score" REAL /* Trend score of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hashtag was used in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mentioned user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mention was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being replied to */,
  "in_reply_to_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user replying */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reply was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_in_reply_to_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("in_reply_to_status_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being retweeted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user retweeting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the retweet was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user liking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the like was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the tweet */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis of the tweet */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions the tweet has received */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., retweet, like, reply, quote) */,
  "engagement_value" INTEGER /* Value of the engagement (e.g., number of retweets, likes, replies, quotes) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_following" (
  "following_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each following relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "following_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the following relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("following_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_following_following_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("following_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_following_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
